Our Services

Professional Electrical Services

Skilled electricians, genuine products, and reliable service across Kathmandu Valley.

House Wiring

Complete electrical wiring for new houses, renovations, and rewiring. We use genuine branded wires and follow safety standards.

Book Now ->

Office & Shop Wiring

Professional electrical setup for offices, shops, restaurants, and commercial spaces with clean cable management.

Book Now ->

Maintenance & Repair

Quick troubleshooting and repair for power failures, short circuits, faulty switches, and other electrical issues.

Book Now ->

Lighting Installation

LED panel lights, chandeliers, strip lights, outdoor lighting. We handle the complete installation.

Book Now ->

Panel Board Work

Distribution board installation, MCB/RCCB fitting, load balancing, and electrical panel upgrades.

Book Now ->

Safety Inspection

Complete electrical safety audit for homes and commercial spaces. Identify risks and get a detailed report.

Book Now ->

CCTV Wiring & Installation

Complete CCTV cable routing, camera fitting, and setup for homes, offices, shops, and other commercial spaces.

Book Now ->

Inverter Battery Installation

Safe inverter and battery installation with proper connection, testing, and backup power setup guidance.

Book Now ->

Electrician Visit

Book a skilled electrician for any small or large electrical task. Same-day service available in Kathmandu Valley.

Book Now ->

Project Electrical Supply

Complete electrical supply for construction projects with consultation, BOQ support, and delivery.

Book Now ->

Need an Electrician?

Call us or send a WhatsApp message for quick service booking. Same-day support available.
